# Buckets Explorer

S3 object storage management web app for multi-tenant research facilities.

## Tech stack

- Backend: Django 4.2 + Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL (gunicorn WSGI)
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite + TypeScript, served by nginx
- Auth: Authentik OIDC ‚Üí JWT (social-auth-app-django + simplejwt)
- Storage: Ceph RGW (S3-compatible), managed via RGWSquared microservice
- Infra: Kubernetes (K3s dev, production cluster), images on GHCR (ghcr.io/luisfpal/)

## Key domain concepts

- **Tenant**: A research lab/project with its own S3 namespace (e.g. NFFADI, LAGE)
- **TenantMembership**: User‚ÜîTenant link ‚Äî holds `ceph_username`, `role` (rw/ro), `uo_code`
- **Bucket** (two types):
  - `proposal`: created by RGWSquared sync from instrument data; undeletable; read-only metadata
  - `local`: created by users for their own research; deletable by owner
- **BucketPermission**: per-user, per-bucket access (owner / rw / ro); source `rgwsquared` or `local`
- **FileUploadRecord**: tracks who uploaded each file (for shared-bucket governance)
- **FileNameRule**: required substrings for filenames in a tenant (admin-configurable)
- **TenantDocument**: per-tenant Markdown document shown as a configurable nav tab to users
- **GroupTenantMapping**: maps an Authentik group to a tenant + role (used at login to assign memberships)

## Authentication flow

1. `GET /api/oauth/login/authentik/` ‚Äî initiates OIDC redirect to Authentik
2. Authentik authenticates user, redirects back with auth code
3. `GET /api/auth/token/` ‚Äî exchanges OAuth2 session for JWT; returns `access` + `refresh` tokens
4. All subsequent requests: `Authorization: Bearer <access>`
5. Multi-tenant users: `POST /api/auth/select-tenant/` to set `X-Tenant-ID`
6. Bucket endpoints require `X-Tenant-ID` header

## API

- Base URL: `/api/`
- Interactive docs (Swagger UI): `/api/docs/` (staff-only in production)
- Machine-readable schema (OpenAPI JSON): `/api/schema/`
- Auth endpoints: `/api/auth/`
- Bucket CRUD: `/api/buckets/`
- Admin endpoints (separate JWT): `/api/admin/`

## Source layout

```
backend/
  storage/
    models.py          ‚Äî all Django models (User, Tenant, Bucket, TenantMembership, ...)
    views/
      auth.py          ‚Äî exchange_token, current_user, select_tenant
      buckets.py       ‚Äî BucketViewSet (list, create, retrieve, destroy, upload, download, shares)
      admin.py         ‚Äî admin panel endpoints (users, tenants, sync, file governance)
    pipeline.py        ‚Äî social-auth pipeline (user provisioning at login)
    serializers.py     ‚Äî DRF serializers
  settings.py          ‚Äî all configuration (env-driven)
  urls.py              ‚Äî URL routing

frontend/
  src/
    services/api.ts    ‚Äî all API calls (fully typed)
    types/index.ts     ‚Äî all TypeScript interfaces
    components/        ‚Äî React components (Dashboard, BucketDetail, admin/*)

k8s/
  app.sh              ‚Äî deployment script (dev only)
  manifests/app/      ‚Äî Kubernetes manifests for the webapp
  env/dev/ env/prod/  ‚Äî environment overlays (secrets + config)
```
